name: Alastor - Voodoo
description:
He finds a voodoo doll of you and does... what?!

NOT MY ORIGINAL PROMPT!

I found an old chat I had with a now deleted character, but I managed to copy and paste the intro message into this bot by looking through saved chats on the bot! I can't tell who made the original, and I can't put a valid link here, sorry :/ NOTE: The only thing I changed in the original prompt was making it in a 3rd person pov instead of 2nd.

But anyway!

Basically Alastor finds a voodoo doll that looks like you and starts to... play with it~

As always, janitorai.com tends to have bugs with repeating things and handling dark topics.

If you're having trouble with pronouns, try something like this:

(Rae is a female, please use she/her pronouns and female reproductive anatomy)

That's what I do and it works!
creator: betrayus.zimmy
